young_page.default.speaker: Young Page
young_page.default.text: Hello, I am a Young Page adjacent to you.

young_page.evening.speaker: Young Page
young_page.evening.text: It is getting late, I should go home and rest.

young_page.quest_start.speaker: Young Page
young_page.quest_start.text: You there! A slime has been spotted lurking in the Eastern Ruins beyond the field's edge. Prove your mettle — go slay it and bring me proof!

young_page.quest_active.speaker: Young Page
young_page.quest_active.text: The slime won't slay itself. Head east to the ruins and bring back its remains!

young_page.quest_active_ready.speaker: Young Page
young_page.quest_active_ready.text: You actually did it! Those slime remains are unmistakable. Well fought — here is your reward.

young_page.quest_completed.speaker: Young Page
young_page.quest_completed.text: You have proven yourself a capable fighter. Keep training and greater challenges will follow.
